name: PR detail Files changed tab renders the seeded diff
description: From PR #482, open the Files changed tab and confirm the unified-diff viewer renders a seeded file path (src/config.ts). Exercises the refactored diff-viewer (DiffViewer → FileCard → CodeLine). Read-only seeded data (no model call). Assumes a freshly-seeded DB (see e2e/README.md).

cmd: Add rate limiting to public API endpoints
steps.label: open the PR row
navigate to the PR detail route
switch to the Files changed tab
diff tab is active in the URL
a seeded changed file renders in the diff viewer
